title: Winnipeg, Manitoba — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Winnipeg, Manitoba: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Winnipeg is a city in Manitoba with a population of 749,607. The Prairie’s cultural heart with a vibrant arts scene, affordable housing, and some of Canada’s sunniest weather — but cold winters.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
